task_completion.description: Navigate to the Naval Station Norfolk piers
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map view should show satellite imagery of Naval Station Norfolk, specifically the piers containing large aircraft carriers (long, flat-decked ships).

task_completion.description: Open the ruler or measurement tool within the application
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Ruler', 'Measure', or 'Line' tool dialog box should be visible on the screen, or the cursor should indicate measurement mode.

task_completion.description: Draw a measurement line along the length of an aircraft carrier
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visible line (often yellow or red) should be drawn on the map overlay, extending from the stern (back) to the bow (front) of one of the aircraft carriers at the pier.

task_completion.description: Verify the measured length is accurate for a carrier (approx. 333m)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The measurement dialog box should display a distance/length value. The value should be approximately 333 meters (or 0.33 km), typically between 315m and 350m to account for manual placement error.

task_completion.description: Save the measurement within the application with the specific name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Places' panel or sidebar should show a new item named 'Carrier_Length_Measurement' (case-sensitive).

task_completion.description: Export the measurement as a KML file to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' or 'Export' file dialog should be visible showing the destination folder '/home/ga/Documents/' and the filename 'carrier_measurement.kml'.

integrity.description: Ensure the KML file was not generated via terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should not show a terminal window where the agent is manually typing KML XML content or using 'echo'/'cat' to create the file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the mapping software GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the mapping application interface (e.g., Google Earth, Marble) being the active window with visible mouse cursors or highlighted buttons.

integrity.description: Ensure the measurement was derived from visual interaction, not hardcoded
integrity.visual_evidence: The measurement line must be visually present on the map over a ship; the result should not appear without the corresponding graphical line.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Naval Station Norfolk is located at 36.95°N, 76.33°W. The base hosts Nimitz-class and Ford-class aircraft carriers. A Nimitz-class carrier is approximately 333 meters long. A Ford-class carrier is approximately 337 meters long. Valid measurements should fall within the range of 315 to 350 meters to account for manual clicking precision.
